kalosnap.title: KaloSnap | The Nutrition Journal for Busy People
kalosnap.description: Log your meals in a second with a single photo.
kalosnap.hero_tag: THE NUTRITION JOURNAL FOR BUSY PEOPLE
kalosnap.hero_sub: Log your meals in a second with a single photo. No scales, no infinite forms, no friction.
kalosnap.section_desc: Forget searching for ingredients one by one in outdated databases. Our system analyzes your plate instantly with a single photograph, automatically tracking your macros so you can get on with your day.
kalosnap.module1_desc: Capture your plate and let technology do the heavy lifting. Immediate recognition of any cuisine.
kalosnap.module2_desc: Stop obsessing over every gram. Set your goal and let KaloSnap handle the rest. Real results without the stress.
kalosnap.module3_desc: Weekly editorial summaries that translate raw data into actionable biological insights. Your health, curated.
kalosnap.chart_desc: A visual, stress-free way to see how your meals align with your biological goals, without the obsession.
kalosnap.bottom_cta: Begin your journey towards nutritional clarity.

nebula.title: Nebula | Trading Intelligence
nebula.description: Weekly trading signals powered by Deep Learning and macro analysis.
nebula.hero_sub: Weekly trading signals powered by Deep Learning models and macro regime analysis. More information, less noise.
nebula.section_features_desc: Nebula operates in three layers: directional prediction, macro environment filtering, and automated regulatory compliance. Every signal is validated across multiple stages before reaching your dashboard.
nebula.feature1_desc: Deep learning models with calibrated confidence intervals for weekly predictions. Multi-layer validation that maximizes signal reliability before publication.
nebula.feature2_desc: Macroeconomic environment analysis that identifies optimal market climate. Intelligent filtering to trade only when conditions favor the strategy.
nebula.feature3_desc: Automated protection system that ensures regulatory compliance and blocks trades when normative conditions require it. Intelligent restriction management.
nebula.section_metrics_desc: Backtest results on real market data. Strategy performance with portfolio rotation and active macro regime filter.
nebula.section_pipeline_desc: Each signal goes through a multi-stage validation process before being presented on the dashboard.
nebula.section_markets_desc: Multi-market support with real-time data: North America, Europe and IBEX 35.
nebula.section_cta_desc: Access the Nebula dashboard and start receiving weekly signals with integrated macro analysis.
nebula.footer_tagline: Trading intelligence platform. A SELLUM Software Studio product.
